patch.value: Agents need an intuitive way to choose the next actionable pm item without reading every item body. Enhance pm-brief next with evidence-weighted explanations and confidence so project management stays context management while reducing token waste.

pm brief next supports --explain and --confidence; ranked items expose evidence-weighted score/confidence/reasons in JSON and concise text; ranking considers unblockability, active dependency fanout, stale age, linked docs/files evidence, and release/deadline proximity; tests and README cover the behavior; release check passes.

Agents need an intuitive way to choose the next actionable pm item without reading every item body. Enhance pm-brief next with evidence-weighted explanations and confidence so project management stays context management while reducing token waste.

Implemented evidence-weighted next-action ranking on 2026-06-12. Ranking now emits score, confidence, and compact evidence reasons covering priority, unblockability, active dependencies, fanout, stale age, linked docs/files, release, and deadline proximity. Added --explain and --confidence to pm brief next text output; JSON output includes structured ranking metadata. Verification: npm run release:check passed, and real CLI smoke test passed with pm install . --project followed by pm brief next --count 5 --explain --confidence --format json against this repo's pm data.

Agents need an intuitive way to choose the next actionable pm item without reading every item body. Enhance pm-brief next with evidence-weighted explanations and confidence so project management stays context management while reducing token waste.

Implemented evidence-weighted next-action ranking on 2026-06-12. Ranking now emits score, confidence, and compact evidence reasons covering priority, unblockability, active dependencies, fanout, stale age, linked docs/files, release, and deadline proximity. Added --explain and --confidence to pm brief next text output; JSON output includes structured ranking metadata. Verification: npm run release:check passed, and real CLI smoke test passed with pm install . --project followed by pm brief next --count 5 --explain --confidence --format json against this repo's pm data.

Review feedback addressed on 2026-06-12: ranking now treats only active/open dependency targets as blockers, uses all open workspace items for dependency/fanout scoring even when filters are applied, reuses precomputed RankEvidence when materializing BriefItem output, and adds regression coverage for work blocked only by closed items. Verification after the fix: npm run release:check passed with 17 tests and real pm CLI smoke test passed with pm install . --project plus pm brief next --count 5 --explain --confidence --format json.
Evidence-weighted ranking shipped with active dependency blocker semantics, confidence, explanations, and regression tests.
pm brief next exposes explainable score/confidence/reasons without penalizing items blocked only by closed work.
npm run release:check passed with 17 tests; real pm brief next --explain --confidence JSON smoke test passed against repository pm data.
Implemented evidence-weighted next-action ranking, addressed review feedback, and verified release gate plus real pm CLI smoke test.
